SEARCH
Package client.view

Class DashboardController

java.lang.Object
client.view.DashboardController
public class DashboardController extends Object
Dashboard: a role-aware overview that greets the logged-in actor, shows a few real summary cards plus an attention line, and offers a quick-link launchpad.

It is deliberately not another reservation list (that is "My Reservations"): it summarizes and routes, never managing an individual item. Every figure is read from a live server response through the existing NetworkService wrappers — nothing is hardcoded:

  • Visitor — listReservations drives the next upcoming visit and the active count; listNotifications drives the unread count.
  • PARK_EMPLOYEE — currentOccupancy drives a live occupancy card.
  • DEPT_MANAGER — listPendingChanges drives a pending-approvals card.
  • PARK_MANAGER — listParks drives a capacity card (live occupancy is gated to PARK_EMPLOYEE server-side), plus the park-parameters link.
  • SERVICE_REP — registration quick links (no metric).

Park names are resolved via listParks (open to any logged-in actor) so cards can name a park rather than show a bare id. All futures resolve on the FX thread, so the populate callbacks update the scene graph directly without blocking.

    Title-cases a role label: "PARK_EMPLOYEE" → "Park Employee"; "Subscriber" stays "Subscriber".

  • Constructor Details

    • DashboardController

      public DashboardController(NetworkService network, Session session, Navigator navigator)
      Creates the dashboard controller.
      Parameters:
      network - the shared network service
      session - the current client session
      navigator - navigates between screens

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      private void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle hook: greets the actor and renders the role-specific view.

    • renderVisitor

      private void renderVisitor()
      Renders the visitor dashboard: next-visit and active-reservations cards.

    • loadVisitorReservations

      private void loadVisitorReservations(Map<Integer,String> parkNames)
      Loads the visitor's reservations and fills the next-visit/active cards.
      Parameters:
      parkNames - park id → name lookup for naming the next visit's park

    • nextVisitCard

      private VBox nextVisitCard(ReservationDTO next, LocalDate nextDate, Map<Integer,String> parkNames)
      Builds the "next visit" card, or an empty-state card when there is none.
      Parameters:
      next - the soonest upcoming reservation, or null
      nextDate - that reservation's date, or null
      parkNames - park id → name lookup
      Returns:
      the next-visit stat card

    • activeCard

      private VBox activeCard(int active, int confirmed, int pending, int waiting)
      Builds the "active reservations" card with a per-status breakdown.
      Parameters:
      active - total active reservations
      confirmed - confirmed count
      pending - pending count
      waiting - waiting-list count
      Returns:
      the active-reservations stat card

    • refreshVisitorAlert

      private void refreshVisitorAlert()
      Recomputes the visitor attention line from the pending/waiting/unread counts.

    • statCard

      private VBox statCard(String label, String value, String sub)
      Builds a stat card with a label, a big value, and a sub-line.
      Parameters:
      label - the card's caption
      value - the headline value
      sub - the sub-line detail
      Returns:
      the assembled stat card

    • loadingCard

      private VBox loadingCard(String label)
      Placeholder card shown while a metric is still loading.
      Parameters:
      label - the card's caption
      Returns:
      a loading stat card

    • errorCard

      private VBox errorCard(String label, String message)
      Card shown when a metric request fails, surfacing the server's message.
      Parameters:
      label - the card's caption
      message - the server's error message (or blank for "unavailable")
      Returns:
      an error stat card

    • quickButton

      private Button quickButton(String text, String navId, boolean primary)
      Builds a quick-link button that navigates to a screen on click.
      Parameters:
      text - the button label
      navId - the target screen id
      primary - whether to use primary (vs secondary) styling
      Returns:
      the quick-link button

    • showAlert

      private void showAlert(String text, boolean calm)
      Shows the attention banner.
      Parameters:
      text - the banner text
      calm - whether to use the calm (all-caught-up) styling

    • hideAlert

      private void hideAlert()
      Hides the attention banner.

      private Map<Integer,String> parkNamesFrom(ServerResponse res)
      Builds the park id → name lookup from a LIST_PARKS response.
      Parameters:
      res - the LIST_PARKS response
      Returns:
      a park id → name map (empty on failure)

    • reservationsFrom

      private List<ReservationDTO> reservationsFrom(ServerResponse res)
      Extracts the reservation list from a LIST_RESERVATIONS response.
      Parameters:
      res - the response
      Returns:
      the reservations (empty on failure)

      private int unreadCount(ServerResponse res)
      Counts unacknowledged notifications in a LIST_NOTIFICATIONS response.
      Parameters:
      res - the response
      Returns:
      the number of unread notifications (0 on failure)

    • parseDate

      private static LocalDate parseDate(String iso)
      Parses an ISO date, returning null on null/invalid input.
      Parameters:
      iso - the ISO yyyy-MM-dd string, or null
      Returns:
      the parsed date, or null

    • formatDate

      private static String formatDate(LocalDate d)
      Formats a date with DATE_FMT, or an em dash for null.
      Parameters:
      d - the date, or null
      Returns:
      the formatted date, or an em dash

    • firstNameOf

      private static String firstNameOf(String name)
      Extracts the first name from a display name, defaulting to "there".
      Parameters:
      name - the full display name, or null
      Returns:
      the first word, or "there" if blank

    • prettyRole

      private static String prettyRole(String roleLabel)
      Title-cases a role label: "PARK_EMPLOYEE" → "Park Employee"; "Subscriber" stays "Subscriber".
      Parameters:
      roleLabel - the raw role label
      Returns:
      the human-friendly role label

    • plural

      private static String plural(int n, String noun)
      Formats a count with a pluralized noun (1 item / 2 items).
      Parameters:
      n - the count
      noun - the singular noun
      Returns:
      "<n> <noun>[s]"

    • withClass

      private static <T extends Node> T withClass(T node, String cls)
      Adds a style class to a node and returns it (for inline use).
      Type Parameters:
      T - the node type
      Parameters:
      node - the node to style
      cls - the style class to add
      Returns:
      the same node, for chaining
